=== STEP 16 ===

--- REQUEST ---
READ_FILE_RESULT for /usr/home/jkh/Src/freebsd-src-on-angry-AI/usr.bin/nohup/Makefile.depend:
PROGRESS:
📁 Directory: usr.bin/nohup
📄 File: usr.bin/nohup/Makefile.depend
✏️  Edits: 3 files modified

```
# Autogenerated - do NOT edit!

DIRDEPS = \
	include \
	include/xlocale \
	lib/${CSU_DIR} \
	lib/libc \
	lib/libcompiler_rt \


.include <dirdeps.mk>

.if ${DEP_RELDIR} == ${_DEP_RELDIR}
# local dependencies - needed for -jN in clean tree
.endif

```

--- RESPONSE ---


The Makefile might have issues with FreeBSD make syntax. Let me simplify it and also check if `DESTDIR` needs a default.

ACTION: EDIT_FILE usr.bin/nohup/Makefile
OLD:
<<<
PROG=	nohup
BINDIR?=	/usr/bin
BINOWN?=	root
BINGRP?=	wheel
BINMODE?=	555

CARGO?=		cargo
CARGO_TARGET_DIR?=	${.CURDIR}/cargo-target

.PHONY: all install clean

${PROG}: ${.CURDIR}/Cargo.toml ${.CURDIR}/src/main.rs
	${CARGO} build --manifest-path ${.CURDIR}/Cargo.toml --offline --target-dir ${CARGO_TARGET_DIR}
	cp ${CARGO_TARGET_DIR}/debug/${PROG} ${.TARGET}

all: ${PROG}

install: ${PROG}
	install -o ${BINOWN} -g ${BINGRP} -m ${BINMODE} ${PROG} ${DESTDIR}${BINDIR}/${PROG}

clean:
	rm -f ${PROG}
	rm -rf ${CARGO_TARGET_DIR}
>>>
NEW:
<<<
PROG=	nohup
BINDIR?=	/usr/bin
BINOWN?=	root
BINGRP?=	wheel
BINMODE?=	555
DESTDIR?=

CARGO?=		cargo
CARGO_TARGET_DIR?=	${.CURDIR}/cargo-target

${PROG}: ${.CURDIR}/Cargo.toml ${.CURDIR}/src/main.rs
	${CARGO} build --manifest-path ${.CURDIR}/Cargo.toml --offline --target-dir ${CARGO_TARGET_DIR}
	cp ${CARGO_TARGET_DIR}/debug/${PROG} ${.TARGET}

all: ${PROG}

install: ${PROG}
	install -o ${BINOWN} -g ${BINGRP} -m ${BINMODE} ${PROG} ${DESTDIR}${BINDIR}/${PROG}

clean:
	rm -f ${PROG}
	rm -rf ${CARGO_TARGET_DIR}
>>>
